name: Chimneysweeps
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup blanched almonds, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rack in center of oven. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Line baking sheets with parchment paper and lightly butter the parchment (if cooking spray is available, spray the paper).
3. In a food processor fitted with the steel blade, grind 1 cup blanched almonds and 2/3 cup sugar to a fine texture.
4. Add 1 egg white and blend for 10 seconds.
5. Add half of the remaining sugar and blend for another 10 seconds.
6. Add the remaining sugar and blend for an additional 10 seconds.
7. Transfer mixture to a medium bowl.
8. Mix in melted chocolate, chopped almonds, and cocoa powder.
9. Using a tablespoon, drop batter onto prepared sheets, leaving at least 1½ inches between each cookie.
10. Moisten fingertips with cold water and shape the dough into ¾-inch high, 1-¼ inch wide mounds.
11. Place a whole almond in the center of each mound, pointed end up.
12. Bake until cookies are dry and firm on the outside but soft in the center, about 12-15 minutes.
13. Let set on baking sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to a rack to cool.
